elements.name: Admin tests invalid and valid login then downloads pdf

steps.name: Admin navigate to the login page
Admin enters invalid email and valid password
Admin clicks the login button
Invalid credentials message should be displayed
Admin clears the login fields
Admin enters valid email and invalid password
Admin clicks the login button
Invalid credentials message should be displayed
Admin clears the login fields
Admin enters valid email and valid password
Admin clicks the login button
Admin should be redirected to the admin dashboard
Admin clicks the export pdf button
